description: This file contains SCSS mixins related to gradient backgrounds, including linear and radial gradients, as well as directional and striped gradient patterns.

methods.name: gradient-bg
methods.description: Applies a background color and optionally a gradient background if gradients are enabled.

methods.name: gradient-x
methods.description: Creates a horizontal linear gradient from left to right with specified start and end colors and positions.

methods.name: gradient-y
methods.description: Creates a vertical linear gradient from top to bottom with specified start and end colors and positions.

methods.name: gradient-directional
methods.description: Creates a linear gradient at a specified angle between two colors.

methods.name: gradient-x-three-colors
methods.description: Creates a horizontal linear gradient with three colors, including a midpoint color stop.

methods.name: gradient-y-three-colors
methods.description: Creates a vertical linear gradient with three colors, including a midpoint color stop.

methods.name: gradient-radial
methods.description: Creates a radial gradient with specified inner and outer colors.

methods.name: gradient-striped
methods.description: Creates a striped pattern with transparent and colored stripes at a specified angle.
